feed.title: Daily Autodigital Shelf
feed.subtitle: A quiet system that makes a new sellable pack every day.

entry.title: Simple Content Calendar
entry.summary: A low-pressure one-week content planner for small brands, creators, and solo operators.

entry.title: Subscription Audit Sheet
entry.summary: A quick worksheet for finding recurring charges, renewal dates, and pause candidates.

entry.title: Honest Follow-Up Draft Kit
entry.summary: A non-spam template sheet for following up with one real person or lead.

entry.title: Digital Declutter Sprint
entry.summary: A focused cleanup sheet for one folder, inbox, download pile, or project archive.

entry.title: Micro Budget Reset
entry.summary: A one-page reset for seeing near-term bills, small leaks, and the next cash decision.

entry.title: Tiny Home Inventory Pack
entry.summary: A room-by-room mini inventory for renters, homeowners, resellers, and insurance prep.

entry.title: Low-Energy Week Planner
entry.summary: A gentle planning sheet for weeks where consistency matters more than intensity.

entry.title: Receipt Runner Ledger Pack
entry.summary: A simple ledger and daily receipt habit for tiny projects that need proof of movement.

entry.title: Calm Launch One-Page Kit
entry.summary: A printable page for turning one messy idea into one offer, one audience, and one next action.

entry.title: Landing Page Copy Blocks
entry.summary: A fill-in worksheet for headline, promise, proof, offer, and next action copy.

entry.title: Renewal Reminder Sheet
entry.summary: A small tracker for domain, software, insurance, lease, and service renewal dates.

entry.title: Link-in-Bio Audit
entry.summary: A simple audit sheet for checking whether a public profile points visitors to one useful action.

entry.title: Focus Menu Builder
entry.summary: A menu of low, medium, and high energy task options for days when planning from scratch is too expensive.

entry.title: Store Import Prep Sheet
entry.summary: A worksheet for gathering product title, description, price hint, tags, and delivery files before using a store platform.

entry.title: Two-Hour Workblock Planner
entry.summary: A compact planning sheet for choosing one outcome, one timer, and one shutdown note.

entry.title: Simple Order Form Draft
entry.summary: A draft sheet for designing a small order or request form before building it online.

entry.title: Daily Proof Log
entry.summary: A receipt-style log for recording visible proof of work without overexplaining the whole day.

entry.title: Project Rescue Map
entry.summary: A one-page map for rescuing a messy project by separating assets, blockers, risks, and next moves.

entry.title: Email Triage Sprint
entry.summary: A 15-minute inbox worksheet for finding the few messages that actually need action.

entry.title: Decision Parking Lot
entry.summary: A worksheet for parking unresolved decisions so they stop interrupting the current task.

entry.title: Tiny Launch Checklist
entry.summary: A compact launch checklist for publishing a small page, pack, or offer without waiting for perfect.

entry.title: Micro Offer Pricing Sheet
entry.summary: A simple worksheet for pricing a small digital or service offer without pretending the market is guaranteed.

entry.title: Weekly Reset Board
entry.summary: A printable reset board for tasks, bills, errands, and loose ends that need one weekly review.

entry.title: One-Page SOP Builder
entry.summary: A worksheet for documenting one repeatable task so someone else can follow it.

entry.title: Listing Photo Checklist
entry.summary: A practical shot list for creating clearer marketplace, rental, or product listing photos.

entry.title: Client Intake Lite
entry.summary: A small intake sheet for turning a vague request into scope, timeline, budget, and next action.

entry.title: Appointment Prep Card
entry.summary: A one-page prep card for collecting questions, documents, and follow-up notes before an appointment.

entry.title: Downloads Folder Reset
entry.summary: A 20-minute digital cleanup worksheet for turning a downloads pile into decisions.

entry.title: Invoice Follow-Up Mini Kit
entry.summary: A calm worksheet for tracking unpaid invoices and writing one clear follow-up.

entry.title: Simple Content Calendar
entry.summary: A low-pressure one-week content planner for small brands, creators, and solo operators.

entry.summary: A quick worksheet for finding recurring charges, renewal dates, and pause candidates.
